description: HFCD Football OS Accuracy-First tools available to the Thing-Nature Gemini agent.

tools.name: football_get_fixtures
tools.description: Return current predictable football fixtures from the HFCD Football feed.

tools.name: football_predict_all
tools.description: Return all matches grouped by official_accuracy, watchlist, rejected/no_signal and high-accuracy combo candidates.

tools.name: football_predict_match
tools.description: Return one match prediction with league, kickoff, market, predicted_result, model_prob, historical_hit_rate, Brier, log_loss, calibration_error, model_agreement, accuracy_grade, failure_risk and explanation. Odds/edge/EV are reference fields only.

matchId.description: Feed event_id or a team-name search string.

tools.name: football_refresh_odds
tools.description: Refresh football odds cache through the server-side runner. API keys stay server-side.

tools.name: football_get_parlay_candidates
tools.description: Return high-accuracy combo candidates and every leg's market, predicted result, model probability, historical hit rate, accuracy grade and risk notes.

tools.name: football_settle_results
tools.description: Settle paper-trading recommendations with final scores supplied by the caller.
